# Rokkit Toolbar Component

> Data-driven action toolbar with keyboard navigation, item types, and section layout.

The Toolbar component renders a horizontal or vertical action bar. Items can be buttons, toggles, separators, spacers, or custom snippets. Supports sticky positioning, compact mode, and slot-based section layout.

## Quick Start

```svelte
<script>
  import { Toolbar } from '@rokkit/ui'

  const items = [
    { text: 'Bold',   value: 'bold',   icon: 'i-lucide:bold' },
    { text: 'Italic', value: 'italic', icon: 'i-lucide:italic' },
    { type: 'separator' },
    { text: 'Link',   value: 'link',   icon: 'i-lucide:link' }
  ]

  function handleClick(value, item) {
    console.log('Clicked:', value)
  }
</script>

<Toolbar {items} onclick={handleClick} />
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `ToolbarItem[]` | `[]` | Data-driven items array |
| `fields` | `ToolbarFields` | defaults | Field mapping |
| `position` | `'top'|'bottom'|'left'|'right'` | `'top'` | Toolbar position (affects orientation) |
| `size` | `'sm'|'md'|'lg'` | `'md'` | Size variant |
| `sticky` | `boolean` | `false` | Stick toolbar to its position |
| `compact` | `boolean` | `false` | Reduced padding |
| `showDividers` | `boolean` | `true` | Show dividers between sections |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Disable all items |
| `onclick` | `(value, item) => void` | — | Called when item is clicked |
| `class` | `string` | `''` | Additional CSS classes |

## Field Mapping

| Field | Default | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `value` | `'value'` | Value emitted on click |
| `text` | `'text'` | Tooltip and aria-label |
| `icon` | `'icon'` | Icon class name |
| `type` | `'type'` | Item type (see below) |
| `disabled` | `'disabled'` | Disabled state |
| `active` | `'active'` | Pressed/active state |
| `label` | `'label'` | Aria-label override |
| `shortcut` | `'shortcut'` | Keyboard shortcut display |
| `snippet` | `'snippet'` | Named snippet override |

## Item Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `'button'` | Default — clickable action button |
| `'toggle'` | Button with pressed/active state |
| `'separator'` | Vertical/horizontal divider line |
| `'spacer'` | Flexible space (pushes items apart) |
| `'custom'` | Rendered via named snippet |

```svelte
const items = [
  { text: 'Save',     value: 'save',  icon: 'i-lucide:save' },
  { type: 'spacer' },   // pushes remaining items to the end
  { text: 'Settings', value: 'settings', icon: 'i-lucide:settings' }
]
```

## Active / Toggle Items

Set `type: 'toggle'` and `active: true` for pressed-state buttons:

```svelte
const items = [
  { text: 'Bold',   value: 'bold',   icon: 'i-lucide:bold',   type: 'toggle', active: true },
  { text: 'Italic', value: 'italic', icon: 'i-lucide:italic', type: 'toggle', active: false }
]
```

## Section Layout (Slot-Based)

Use `start`, `center`, and `end` snippets for manual section layout:

```svelte
<Toolbar>
  {#snippet start()}
    <button>New</button>
    <button>Open</button>
  {/snippet}

  {#snippet center()}
    <SearchInput />
  {/snippet}

  {#snippet end()}
    <UserMenu />
  {/snippet}
</Toolbar>
```

## Custom Item Snippet

```svelte
<Toolbar {items} onclick={handleClick}>
  {#snippet item(data, fields, handlers)}
    <button onclick={handlers.onclick} onkeydown={handlers.onkeydown}
      title={data.text} aria-pressed={data.active}>
      <span class={data.icon}></span>
    </button>
  {/snippet}
</Toolbar>
```

## Named Snippets (Per-Item)

Set `snippet: 'myWidget'` on an item and pass a matching snippet:

```svelte
<script>
  const items = [
    { text: 'Zoom', value: 'zoom', type: 'custom', snippet: 'zoom' }
  ]
</script>

<Toolbar {items}>
  {#snippet zoom(data, fields, handlers)}
    <div class="zoom-control">
      <button onclick={() => zoom(-1)}>-</button>
      <span>100%</span>
      <button onclick={() => zoom(1)}>+</button>
    </div>
  {/snippet}
</Toolbar>
```

## Keyboard Navigation

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| `ArrowLeft/Up` | Previous item |
| `ArrowRight/Down` | Next item |
| `Home/End` | First/last item |
| `Enter/Space` | Activate focused item |
| `Tab` | Move focus away |

## Accessibility

- `role="toolbar"` on root
- `aria-label="Toolbar"`
- `aria-pressed` on toggle items
- `aria-disabled` when disabled

## Data Attributes

| Attribute | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `data-toolbar` | Root element |
| `data-toolbar-position` | Position value |
| `data-toolbar-item` | Action button |
| `data-toolbar-separator` | Separator |
| `data-toolbar-spacer` | Spacer |
| `data-toolbar-section` | Named section |
| `data-active` | Active/pressed item |
| `data-disabled` | Disabled state |

## Import

```javascript
import { Toolbar } from '@rokkit/ui'
```

## TypeScript Types

```typescript
interface ToolbarProps {
  items?: ToolbarItem[]
  fields?: ToolbarFields
  position?: 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'
  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'
  sticky?: boolean
  compact?: boolean
  showDividers?: boolean
  disabled?: boolean
  onclick?: (value: unknown, item: ToolbarItem) => void
  class?: string
  item?: Snippet<[ToolbarItem, ToolbarFields, ToolbarItemHandlers]>
  start?: Snippet
  center?: Snippet
  end?: Snippet
  children?: Snippet
}

interface ToolbarFields {
  value?: string    // default: 'value'
  text?: string     // default: 'text'
  icon?: string     // default: 'icon'
  type?: string     // default: 'type'
  disabled?: string // default: 'disabled'
  active?: string   // default: 'active'
  label?: string    // default: 'label'
  shortcut?: string // default: 'shortcut'
  snippet?: string  // default: 'snippet'
}

type ToolbarItemType = 'button' | 'toggle' | 'separator' | 'spacer' | 'custom'
```

## Related Components

- [Menu](/docs/components/dropdown/llms.txt) — dropdown action menu
- [Tabs](/docs/components/tabs/llms.txt) — tab navigation
- [Toggle](/docs/components/toggle/llms.txt) — compact option group
